channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham's cause of death was aortic dissection, medical examiner confirms
item.description: President Trump paid tribute to the late senator Lindsey Graham, a Republican from South Carolina, who had recently returned from a trip to Ukraine.

item.title: Firefighting aircraft crashes into reservoir while battling Gold Mountain Fire
item.description: Dive teams were dispatched to a reservoir in the western part of the state after a firefighting aircraft went down in the water.

item.title: Sam Neill, star of "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano," dies at 78
item.description: New Zealand actor Sam Neill, known for "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano," died Monday at 78, his family announced.

item.title: WATCH: Bison attacks tourist at Yellowstone National Park
item.description: A grandfather walking with his grandson was attacked by a charging bison and thrown at least eight feet into the air in Yellowstone National Park.
